growth_candidates: LIV Nightclub posting frequency gap vs Hakkasan (9.5/week) and XS (8.75/week)
competitive_snapshot.strategy_insight: Market consolidating around brand leaders (OMNIA, XS, Hakkasan, Zouk). New entrant OMNIA Dayclub showing strong engagement (5.2%), validating luxury premium positioning. LIV competitive advantage: higher engagement-to-follower ratio (3.2% vs XS 2.5%, Hakkasan 2.7%) but constrained by low posting frequency (4.5/week vs industry 7-9.5/week). EDC Week (May 14-17) presents 2-3x engagement spike opportunity.
